user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I dont want to see paused press ESC to resume, and I don't want the game to be grayed out, but I also don't want the HUD to be hidden, 

and can you also make sure the ball is an actual 3d ball, right now its just a rotating 2d circle in 3d space
analysis:
- Issue identified: 
  1. Need to ensure PAUSED state doesn't show overlay or gray out the screen, while keeping HUD visible
  2. Ball texture needs to be more obviously 3D - current checkerboard pattern may make it look flat

- Files affected:
  - ui.js (ensure PAUSED state behavior is clear and correct)
  - entities.js (improve ball texture/appearance to look more 3D)

- Changes needed:
  1. In ui.js: Add explicit handling for PAUSED state to ensure HUD remains visible without overlay
  2. In entities.js: Replace checkerboard texture with a more 3D-looking pattern (colored bands/stripes like a beach ball) that clearly shows rotation and spherical shape
